short_summary: Iran deal near, US attention diverted
rationale: For Ukraine, the most critical signal is the Iran-US deal momentum continuing — US diplomatic energy focused on Iran risks diverting attention and resources from Ukraine support; the war itself continues at maximum background level.

top_events.title: Iran claims US deal near; US-Iran war day 106
top_events.summary: Sustained US-Iran deal momentum means Washington's diplomatic focus remains partly diverted from Ukraine. Any deal could free up US attention but also reduce urgency of Ukraine support in the short term.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon; regional war spreading
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon amid Iran deal talks show the Middle East conflict is not winding down, keeping US and Western attention split away from Ukraine's front lines.

top_events.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US tightening AI access for non-Americans is a minor signal of US inward focus on tech security, with negligible direct impact on Ukraine's war situation.
